perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman in a black top holding a bag of red pears inside a Costco warehouse; a large brand logo is overlaid at the top. (2) She gestures towards a shelf price tag labeled 'U.S. RED D'ANJOU PEAR $130' and holds the fruit close to the camera. (3) A second woman wearing a purple sweater and a patterned bucket hat enters the frame, smelling the bag of pears and then a box of Korean mandarins. (4) The scene transitions to a brightly lit indoor home setting where both women sit behind a counter with sliced pears on a wooden board; they talk to the camera and demonstrate eating the fruit. (5) The final shot is a close-up of a hand holding a decorative glass containing a red-tinted drink with floating pear slices.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic pop music starts immediately. A high-pitched, excited female voice describes finding a bargain. (2) Brief segments of dialogue between two females and a male off-screen camera operator regarding the price and quality of the pears. (3) Sound effects like 'shimmers' or 'pops' occur when text appears on screen. The music remains consistent in volume. (4) The audio transitions to a clearer indoor recording as the two women describe the flavor profile, comparing it to a mix of apple and pear, while the BGM continues to play in the background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo remains at the top throughout the first half. (2) Decorative Text: 'Pick up cheap hidden deals' and 'Red D'Anjou Pears 130 yuan' appear with high-contrast colors to hook the viewer. (3) Hook Text: 'Is it worth it?' and 'Great deal!' (4) Functional Text: 'Costco Pears $130' and 'Recommended to soak in wine' appear during the review section to convey tips. (5) Full traditional Chinese subtitles are present at the bottom of the screen translating the dialogue.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at store -> Product selection/Price check -> Home tasting -> Recipe recommendation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 1 male hand/voice (camera person), and several blurred shoppers in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long black hair and wears a black sheer-sleeved top; the second woman wears a purple knit sweater and alternates between a patterned bucket hat and a black beret.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first half is set in a warehouse retail environment with stacked boxes and refrigerated sections; the second half is in a modern, clean apartment kitchen with neutral-colored walls.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio-like lighting indoors and standard industrial fluorescent lighting in the store.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to share a value-for-money food discovery at Costco (U.S. Red D'Anjou Pears) and educate viewers on how to select and prepare them, specifically suggesting they be soaked in white wine for an enhanced flavor experience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While it features Costco products, the style is a personal vlog review rather than a sponsored advertisement.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-paced variety-show style editing with colorful floating text and direct-to-camera address.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages the popularity of 'hidden gem' shopping content to engage the audience.
